title: Identify function type
text: Observe the range of y-values. If they span from negative infinity to positive $$\infty$$, consider tangent or cotangent. If they are bounded, consider sine or cosine.

title: Determine period and B
text: For tangent functions, the period $P $$=$$ \frac{\pi}{B}$. Find a point (x,y) from the table where $$y$$ is a known tangent value to solve for B.

title: Use a known point
text: Use a point like $$(3,1)$$ and the general form $y $$=$$ \tan(Bx)$ to solve for B.

title: Formulate the equation
text: Combine the identified function type and the B value to write the formula.
